footer.description: Virkavastuu.fi is a civic platform promoting transparency and accountability in Finnish public governance.
footer.openData: All information is based on public sources.

hero.title: Know your officials
hero.subtitle: Virkavastuu.fi aggregates public information about Finnish civil servants and enables citizen feedback.

profiles.title: Official profiles
profiles.description: Comprehensive profiles of senior civil servants: appointment date, background, organizations, and public statements.

sources.title: Source-linked data
sources.description: All profile data links to original public sources: lausunto.fi, valtioneuvosto.fi, PRH, media archives.

feedback.title: Citizen feedback
feedback.description: Theme-based ratings per policy area, with results showing sample size and distribution.

feedback.title: Citizen feedback
feedback.verificationSent: A verification email has been sent to your address.
